architecture_invariants: Preserve the R3.4 repository split, root grammar and application boundary.
Keep Universal Launcher Kit and Universal Setup Kit pinned to exact reviewed revisions.
AIDE makes no provider, model or network call.
Cached validation is advisory and never promotes a claim.
Target-runner evidence is never inferred from local validation.
Human gates remain explicit human decisions.
blockers: Linux and macOS target-runner proof requires the corresponding native runners.
Remote CodeQL execution begins only after this task branch is pushed.

checkpoints.evidence_note: Architecture exception detection and the truthful baseline were committed before the resumable wave command existed.
FacMan pinned the independently green and pushed Universal Launcher Kit provider revision.

title: FacMan R3.5 zero-exception productization

stop_conditions: A target lane fails
A runner is unavailable
workunits.title: Fresh native target promotion baseline

stop_conditions: A detected exception is hidden instead of baselined
Availability metadata differs from runtime behavior
workunits.title: Truth and architecture fitness

stop_conditions: Provider ABI changes
More than 32 registrations fail
Provider task revision is not pushed
workunits.title: Universal Launcher Kit dynamic registry

stop_conditions: Manual JSON exception count increases
A domain module exposes raw JSON
workunits.title: JSON, outcome and typed codecs

stop_conditions: R3.2, R3.3 or R3.4 state becomes unreadable
A destructive migration is introduced
workunits.title: Workspace and domain stores

stop_conditions: Generated metadata drifts
An alias enters the runtime registry
workunits.title: Generated command catalog v2

stop_conditions: A generic multiplexer remains authoritative
USK is claimed to evaluate inputs it did not inspect
workunits.title: First-class capability routes

stop_conditions: A C++ exception crosses the C ABI
A v1 symbol or layout changes
workunits.title: ABI containment and reusable client sessions

stop_conditions: Secure randomness falls back to a weak source
Target-specific code leaks into shared compilation
workunits.title: Platform portability

stop_conditions: Human text appears on machine stdout
Transport bounds are removed
DaemonTransport is exposed as available
workunits.title: Bounded machine transport

stop_conditions: A schema keyword is accepted without validation
Remote analysis is inferred from local checks
A material benchmark regression is unexplained
workunits.title: Conformance, compatibility and security

stop_conditions: Wave state cannot resume from a green commit
Cached proof can promote a claim
Closed history enters active context
workunits.title: AIDE resumable wave autonomy

forbidden_paths: optional stretch work before mandatory green
stop_conditions: Any mandatory criterion is not green
Any target evidence is stale
A human-gated capability is promoted
workunits.title: R3.5 zero-exception closeout
